hooks.command: python3 -B -c "import pathlib,subprocess,sys,runpy; r=pathlib.Path(subprocess.check_output(['git','rev-parse','--show-toplevel'], text=True).strip()); h=r/'.codex'/'hooks'/'hookflow'; sys.path.insert(0,str(h)); runpy.run_path(str(h/'session_context.py'), run_name='__main__')"
